kubectl -n ray rollout status deploy/ray-worker --timeout=120s

content.text: All settled, both deployments upgraded and stable. Now let's verify port 6379 (GCS) reachability from a worker/client to the head, and confirm the cluster is fully functional post-upgrade.

input.command:
HEAD_POD=$(kubectl -n ray get pods -l app.kubernetes.io/component=head -o jsonpath='{.items[0].metadata.name}')
echo "Head pod: $HEAD_POD"
kubectl -n ray exec deploy/ray-worker -- python -c "
import socket
s = socket.create_connection(('ray-head', 6379), timeout=5)
print('port 6379 reachable')
s.close()
"
echo ---
kubectl -n ray exec $HEAD_POD -- ray status 2>&1 | head -20
